title: Object Structured Field Extent (0x59)
description: Layout for triplet 0x59: Structured Field Extent triplet. Tlength and Tid (offsets 0 and 1) are omitted from this mapping.
notes: Offsets are relative to the triplet start. Tlength and Tid are not represented here.

elements.name: SFExt
elements.description: Number of structured fields in the object (UBIN, 4 bytes). Range X'00000000' - X'FFFFFFFF'.

elements.name: SFExtHi
elements.description: High-order bytes of the structured field extent (UBIN, 4 bytes). Optional; present when larger representation is used.
